name: Lemonade
description: Lemonade is a lightweight LLM inference server with OpenAI-compatible APIs, supporting multiple backends including CPU, Vulkan, and ROCm.

notes.text: Lemonade Server provides an OpenAI-compatible API for LLM inference.
Server listens on local IP by default - accessible from your network.
Configuration file: /etc/lemonade/lemonade.conf - customize host and port settings.
API keys are stored in /etc/lemonade/secrets.conf - add your API keys there and restart the service.
Supports CPU and Vulkan backends currently; ROCm support for AMD GPUs is planned.
